alerts: Small Craft Advisory — Maui waters — expires Fri Mar 6 6:00pm HST

actual.avg_kts_range: unknown — powered on 3.4m once past wind line
actual.swell_character: clean E windswell — roller type, gliding style, surprisingly good quality

verdict.session_quality_desc: Good — perfectly powered once past wind line, clean water state, enjoyable riding
verdict.equipment_notes: 3.4m + 22m was correct for open water conditions past the wind line. Forecast contingency recommendation of 4.0m/25m was too big.

observations.free_text: Despite NO-GO verdict, session was actually very good. Wind shadow was real — required 300m body drag to reach the wind line. Once past the wind line, kite launched cleanly and conditions were solid. 3.4m was perfectly powered. E-direction windswell was clean and produced good roller-type waves, well-suited to gliding foil style. Easterly direction, while creating a near-shore shadow problem, did NOT ruin the session — the open water past the wind line was quality riding. Key insight: wind shadow = access problem, not a wind quality problem. Once past it, the wind was good.
anomalies: Wind shadow extent only 300m (forecast estimated 500m) — less severe than predicted
E-direction windswell unexpectedly clean and rideable — better wave riding than typical NE chop
Perfectly powered on 3.4m past wind line — implies steady 18-22kts in open water
new_patterns: E-direction wind shadow = access problem only. Open water conditions beyond wind line can be excellent.
E-direction windswell (ENE 9s) = clean rollers suitable for glide-style foil riding
Body drag 300m is manageable for experienced rider — should not auto-cancel session
Wind shadow extent 300m (not always 500-700m) — severity varies
3.4m + 22m = correct kit when iK-TRRM shows 13-15kts open water in E conditions

calibration_notes.verdict_correction: NO-GO was too conservative. Correct verdict for experienced rider: MARGINAL with explicit wind-shadow access warning. Wind shadow = launch challenge, not session cancellation.
calibration_notes.equipment_correction: Contingency gear should have been 3.4m + 22m, not 4.0m + 25m. iK-TRRM 13-15kts open water + E direction + SCA = 3.4m range.
calibration_notes.wave_quality_correction: E-direction windswell (ENE 8-10s) should not default to POOR foil rating. Clean rollers at this period are FAIR-to-GOOD for glide-style foil riding.
calibration_notes.shadow_extent_correction: Wind shadow extent prediction of 500-700m was overstated. Actual was 300m. May be proportional to wind speed — lighter trades = smaller shadow.
